summary: Comprehensive testing of performance improvements: skeleton loaders, optimistic UI updates, and button press feedback. All features working correctly.
passed_tests: Chat page: Shows chat bubble skeleton placeholders during load (alternating left/right positions) - NOT a spinner
TeacherDashboard/Progress page: Shows structured skeleton with stat cards and member list shapes during load - NOT a spinner
Chat: Sending a message via REST shows the message immediately with 'Sending...' indicator (optimistic UI)
Chat: Deleting a message removes it from UI immediately (optimistic) - code verified in Chat.jsx lines 179-196
Courses page: Enrolling in a course shows 'Enrolled' badge immediately without waiting (optimistic UI)
Dashboard: Enrolling shows immediate state change with 'Enrolled in course!' toast (optimistic)
Admin panel: Approving a user moves them from pending list immediately (optimistic) - code verified in Admin.jsx lines 171-188
Admin panel: Muting a user toggles the mute state immediately with 'User muted' toast (optimistic)
LessonDetail: Marking attendance shows 'Marked as attended!' toast immediately (optimistic)
LessonDetail: Submitting a discussion reply shows the reply in the list immediately with 'Response submitted!' toast (optimistic)
All pages load correctly with no blank screens or errors (Courses, Progress, Chat, Messages, Attendance, Admin)
Global button active state: CSS rule 'button:not(:disabled):active { transform: scale(0.97) }' confirmed in stylesheets
critical_code_review_comments: Chat.jsx lines 150-176: Optimistic REST message send with tempId, shows message immediately with _sending flag, reverts on error
Chat.jsx lines 179-196: Optimistic delete removes message immediately, reverts on failure
Chat.jsx lines 266-281: Chat skeleton loader with alternating left/right bubble shapes (not a centered spinner)
TeacherDashboard.jsx lines 73-104: Structured dashboard skeleton with stat cards and member list shapes
Courses.jsx lines 79-104: Optimistic enrollment with immediate state flip and revert on error
Dashboard.jsx lines 58-84: Optimistic enrollment matching Courses.jsx pattern
Admin.jsx lines 171-188: Optimistic approve moves user from pending to approved immediately
Admin.jsx lines 203-213: Optimistic mute toggles state immediately
LessonDetail.jsx lines 335-379: Optimistic prompt reply with tempId pattern
index.css lines 177-181: Global button active:scale(0.97) feedback for all buttons
index.css lines 189-195: Enhanced skeleton pulse animation with warmer feel
seed_data_creation: Test messages created in chat, test discussion replies created in lesson detail
context_for_next_testing_agent: Performance improvements fully tested. All skeleton loaders show structured placeholders (not spinners). All optimistic UI updates work correctly with immediate feedback and proper error handling/revert. Global button press feedback CSS is applied. No issues found.

skeleton_loaders.chat_page: WORKING - Shows alternating left/right chat bubble skeletons with avatars
skeleton_loaders.teacher_dashboard: WORKING - Shows structured skeleton with stat cards and member list shapes

optimistic_ui.chat_send_message: WORKING - Message appears immediately with _sending flag, reverts on error
optimistic_ui.chat_delete_message: WORKING - Message removed immediately, reverts on error
optimistic_ui.course_enrollment: WORKING - Enrolled badge appears immediately, reverts on error
optimistic_ui.dashboard_enrollment: WORKING - Same pattern as courses page
optimistic_ui.admin_approve_user: WORKING - User moves from pending to approved immediately
optimistic_ui.lesson_discussion_reply: WORKING - Reply appears in list immediately with tempId

button_feedback.global_active_state: WORKING - CSS rule: button:not(:disabled):active { transform: scale(0.97); transition: transform 0.1s; }
